en.title: **Android** Developer
en.text: Designed, developed, and maintained multiple Android applications including food delivery, rider, video calling with live chat, cash counter, and utility apps using Java and Kotlin, following clean and scalable architecture. Implemented real-time video calling and live chat features using Agora SDK. Built and optimized backend-driven features using GCP Cloud Functions, Firebase services, and Google Maps APIs.

es.title: Desarrollador **Android**
es.text: Diseñé, desarrollé y mantuve múltiples aplicaciones Android, incluyendo entrega de comida, videollamadas con chat en vivo, y aplicaciones utilitarias usando Java y Kotlin. Implementé videollamadas en tiempo real con Agora SDK y optimicé funciones backend con GCP Cloud Functions y Firebase.

fr.title: Développeur **Android**
fr.text: Conçu, développé et maintenu plusieurs applications Android, y compris la livraison, les appels vidéo avec chat en direct, et des applications utilitaires avec Java et Kotlin. Implémenté les appels vidéo en temps réel avec Agora SDK et optimisé les fonctionnalités backend avec GCP Cloud Functions et Firebase.

ko.title: **Android** 개발자
ko.text: 음식 배달, 라이더, 라이브 채팅 화상 통화, 캐시 카운터 등 다양한 Android 애플리케이션을 Java와 Kotlin으로 설계, 개발 및 유지 관리했습니다. Agora SDK를 사용한 실시간 화상 통화 구현 및 GCP Cloud Functions, Firebase 서비스를 통한 백엔드 최적화.

en.title: **Software** Developer
en.text: Managed GUVNL government tender software, handling ₹12+ lakh daily billing, payment collections, and improving app performance by 30%. Developed the Healthray Android healthcare app with modules for IPD, OPD, prescriptions, HRMS, bed availability, appointments, announcements, and reports, boosting performance by 20%. Streamlined workflows, optimized features, and collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable, scalable, and user-friendly solutions.

es.title: Desarrollador de **Software**
es.text: Administré el software de licitaciones gubernamentales GUVNL, gestionando facturación diaria de ₹12+ lakh y mejorando el rendimiento en un 30%. Desarrollé la app de salud Healthray para Android con módulos de IPD, OPD, prescripciones, HRMS, y reportes, mejorando el rendimiento en un 20%.

fr.title: Développeur **Logiciel**
fr.text: Géré le logiciel de facturation GUVNL pour les appels d'offres gouvernementaux, traitant plus de ₹12 lakh de facturation quotidienne et améliorant les performances de 30%. Développé l'application de santé Healthray avec des modules IPD, OPD, prescriptions, HRMS et rapports, améliorant les performances de 20%.

ko.title: **소프트웨어** 개발자
ko.text: GUVNL 정부 입찰 소프트웨어를 관리하며, 매일 ₹12+ lakh의 청구 및 결제를 처리하고 앱 성능을 30% 향상시켰습니다. IPD, OPD, 처방전, HRMS, 병상 가용성, 예약, 공지사항, 보고서 모듈을 갖춘 Healthray Android 의료 앱을 개발하여 성능을 20% 향상시켰습니다.

en.title: **Software** Developer
en.text: Delivered Anzer and Xeroque projects on time and within budget by leading teams and optimizing workflows. Built Anzer, an RFQ-based procurement platform with automated supplier pricing, order placement, and tracking. Developed Xeroque, a healthcare appointment and queue management system with WhatsApp (Meta) integration and real-time token tracking. Reduced costs by 20% and improved delivery efficiency by 25% through streamlined collaboration.

es.title: Desarrollador de **Software**
es.text: Entregué los proyectos Anzer y Xeroque a tiempo y dentro del presupuesto. Construí Anzer, una plataforma de adquisiciones basada en RFQ con precios automatizados de proveedores. Desarrollé Xeroque, un sistema de gestión de citas y colas médicas con integración de WhatsApp (Meta) y seguimiento de tokens en tiempo real.

fr.title: Développeur **Logiciel**
fr.text: Livré les projets Anzer et Xeroque dans les délais et le budget. Construit Anzer, une plateforme d'approvisionnement basée sur les RFQ avec tarification automatisée. Développé Xeroque, un système de gestion de rendez-vous et de files d'attente avec intégration WhatsApp (Meta) et suivi de tokens en temps réel.

ko.title: **소프트웨어** 개발자
ko.text: Anzer 및 Xeroque 프로젝트를 예산 내에서 기한 내에 납품했습니다. RFQ 기반 조달 플랫폼 Anzer를 구축하고, WhatsApp (Meta) 통합 및 실시간 토큰 추적 기능이 있는 의료 예약 및 대기열 관리 시스템 Xeroque를 개발했습니다. 협업 최적화를 통해 비용 20% 절감, 배송 효율 25% 향상.
